theme.blog.tagsList.description.message: Browse all Larktun blog tags and find posts about zero-trust networking, remote access, Headscale, mobile apps, server access, and deployment topics.

homepage.snapshots.console.description.message: This screenshot introduces zero-trust networking, remote access, security features, and primary scenarios in one view.

homepage.snapshots.pricing.description.message: The current public pricing section helps explain rollout choices alongside deployment guidance.

homepage.snapshots.heading.message: Bring official product screens directly into the help center

homepage.snapshots.subheading.message: The docs site now includes real homepage captures and can grow with deeper control-plane, device, and audit screenshots later.

homepage.hero.title.message: Operate a safer remote network and govern every device from one console

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Larktun combines zero-trust networking, reliable remote access, and centralized operations so distributed teams can move quickly without compromising security.

homepage.panel.title.message: SaaS multi-tenant networking, tenant-level ACL, custom relay, and stable low-footprint runtime

homepage.panel.item.docs.message: Each tenant has an isolated network boundary so devices and access data remain separated across tenants

homepage.panel.item.blog.message: ACL is configured and enforced per tenant, with fine-grained authorization by group, tags, and time windows

homepage.panel.item.showcase.message: Shared, dedicated, and user-managed relay options support different network and compliance requirements

homepage.panel.item.i18n.message: The client runs with low memory in the background, remains non-intrusive, and keeps cross-region access stable

homepage.meta.title.message: Larktun Docs: Zero-Trust Networking and Secure Remote Access

homepage.meta.description.message: Larktun Docs covers zero-trust networking, secure remote access, private network access, device networking, ACLs, multi-tenancy, relays, NAS access, secure SSH, and mobile access.

showcase.principles.value.description.message: Define tenant scope, isolated networks, and access targets first to avoid cross-tenant ambiguity.

showcase.principles.path.title.message: Then describe ACL and relay paths

showcase.principles.path.description.message: Each case should explain ACL enforcement and why shared, dedicated, or user-managed relay was selected.

showcase.principles.reuse.title.message: Finally validate user experience and stability

showcase.principles.reuse.description.message: Include low-footprint, non-intrusive behavior, and connection stability results in every case.

showcase.cases.preview.title.message: Provide strict tenant isolation and independent ACL management for multi-customer delivery teams

showcase.cases.preview.problem.message: Delivery teams operate multiple customer environments and must keep network, policy, and logs fully isolated per customer.

showcase.cases.preview.solution.message: Create one tenant per customer, apply tenant-specific ACL templates, and archive audit logs by tenant.

showcase.cases.preview.outcome.message: Enables parallel multi-customer operations with clear boundaries and lower cross-tenant authorization risk.

showcase.cases.intranet.title.message: Use user-managed relay to improve path control for cross-region engineering teams

showcase.cases.intranet.problem.message: Cross-region teams face latency jitter on public networks, and default paths may miss stability targets.

showcase.cases.intranet.solution.message: Deploy user-managed relay nodes in key regions with health checks and failover policies.

showcase.cases.intranet.outcome.message: Improves path control and reduces cross-region latency and disconnect rates.

showcase.cases.support.title.message: Run the client long-term on office endpoints with low footprint and minimal interruption

showcase.cases.support.problem.message: Endpoint users care about performance and interruption, while operations teams need persistent remote access stability.

showcase.cases.support.solution.message: Enable low-memory background runtime with auto-reconnect and alerting for maintainable operations.

showcase.cases.support.outcome.message: The client stays unobtrusive for daily work while keeping remote capabilities continuously available.

showcase.meta.description.message: Larktun scenario page focused on tenant isolation, independent ACL, custom relay, and stable endpoint experience.

showcase.hero.title.message: Build a reusable case library around tenant isolation and stable remote access

showcase.hero.description.message: This page covers SaaS multi-tenant governance, user-managed relay deployment, and low-footprint endpoint experience as reusable case templates.

showcase.summary.item.problem.message: Define tenant boundaries and isolation goals first, then explain the access flow

showcase.summary.item.architecture.message: State ACL enforcement logic and relay selection rationale explicitly

showcase.summary.item.outcome.message: Summarize outcomes with low-footprint, non-intrusive, and stability metrics

showcase.principles.heading.message: Use one structure for case write-ups to reuse across presales and delivery

showcase.cases.heading.message: These sample cards can be replaced by real projects and expanded continuously

homepage.features.mesh.description.message: Build stable cross-region connectivity on top of WireGuard and Headscale, with every device enrolled under least-privilege access by default.

homepage.features.control.description.message: Optimize access paths for RDP, SSH, and VNC with temporary approval, automatic recovery, and better cross-region operator experience.

homepage.features.security.title.message: Secure by default, traceable end to end

homepage.features.security.description.message: Use MFA, enterprise SSO, policy templates, audit logs, and anomaly signals to bring security governance into day-to-day access flows.

homepage.entries.docs.description.message: Product overview, deployment modes, onboarding flows, and troubleshooting.

homepage.entries.blog.description.message: Release notes, best practices, and content updates live here.

homepage.entries.showcase.description.message: Entry points for distributed engineering, IT operations, and enterprise remote work.

homepage.features.heading.message: Structure content around real product capabilities

homepage.features.subheading.message: Product docs, topic guides, and practical cases are organized around zero-trust networking, remote access, access governance, deployment, and real-world scenarios.

homepage.link.firstPath.message: Create Your First Secure Access Path

architectureDemo.card.description.message: Run login, direct path, and DERP relay flows directly inside the docs page, or open the full demo in a separate tab.
